name: Public Joint Stock Company GAZ
summary: Public Joint Stock Company GAZ manufactures and sells commercial motor vehicles primarily in Russia. The company offers light commercial vehicles under the GAZelle NEXT, GAZelle BUSINESS, and Sobol names; and medium duty trucks under the GAZon Next, GAZ-3309, Sadko, and Zemliak names, as well as specialty vehicles. It also provides all-wheel√Ç¬ñdrive off-road and heavy duty trucks; buses and coaches; diesel engines, fuel injection equipment for diesel engines, and gearboxes; and auto components, such as iron castings, forged products, stampings, dies and molds, tools, systems and assemblies, and non-ferrous castings. The company was formerly known as Open Joint Stock Company GAZ and changed its name to Public Joint Stock Company GAZ in June 2016. The company is based in Nizhny Novgorod, Russia. Public Joint Stock Company GAZ is a subsidiary of Russkie Mashiny, Ooo.
